column1: # Custom partition table for vizbot on 4MB flash boards
# Dual OTA layout: two ~1.8MB app slots for automatic rollback on failed updates.

column2: the ESP32 bootloader reverts to the previous partition.

column1: # LittleFS enlarged to 320KB for cloud content caching + future on-device assets.
# NVS offset is unchanged from Arduino default (0x9000)
# credentials and settings survive a reflash with this partition table.
# Arduino IDE: Tools > Partition Scheme > Custom
# IMPORTANT: First flash after changing partition layout must be via USB serial.
# All subsequent updates can use OTA.
# Note: M5Stack Core S3 (TARGET_CORES3) has 16MB flash — use the board's
# default partition scheme in the IDE when flashing that target.
